acceptance: Every taxonomy topic has a bilingual, sourced document or an explicitly queued research item.
Every canonical document has synchronized TR and EN versions; missing and outdated pairs fail validation.
Reviewed documents reference valid primary sources with access and review dates.
Results expose weighted scores, reasons, evidence, risks, alternatives and ADR export.
Users compare multiple records with type-specific dimensions and exportable results.
Relations are browsable and every endpoint and evidence source validates.
Core routes work offline; cache versions migrate and offline behavior is tested.
Notes support versioned validated import/export and browser-local persistence.
Keyboard, focus, reflow, reduced-motion and WCAG automated checks pass.
Data validation, tests and production build run for every pull request.
Schema-aware drafts, preview, translation and review workflow are available.
Tauri and SQLite begin only after editor, PWA and migration readiness gates pass.
